id: every-minute\n    cron: \"* * * * *\"\n    queue: default\n    type: pipeline_demo\n    payload:\n      steps: 1\n      step_delay_seconds: 0.01\n    max_attempts: 3\n\"\"\"\n    first_runtime = await runtime_factory(\n        name=REDACTED\"scheduler-first\",\n        db_path=REDACTED,\n        schedule_content=REDACTED,\n    )\n    second_runtime = await runtime_factory(\n        name=REDACTED\"scheduler-second\",\n        db_path=REDACTED,\n        schedule_content=REDACTED,\n    )\n    first_scheduler = SchedulerService(\n        runtime=REDACTED,\n        logger=REDACTED\"test.scheduler.first\", service=REDACTED\"test\"),\n        job_service=REDACTED,\n    )\n    second_scheduler = SchedulerService(\n        runtime=REDACTED,\n        logger=REDACTED\"test.scheduler.second\", service=REDACTED\"test\"),\n        job_service=REDACTED,\n    )\n    startup_anchor = utc_timestamp(2026, 1, 1, 12, 0, 30)\n    planned_time = utc_timestamp(2026, 1, 1, 12, 1, 0)\n    first_scheduler._startup_time = startup_anchor\n    second_scheduler._startup_time = startup_anchor\n    monkeypatch.setattr(\n        \"miniq.scheduler.service.utc_now\",\n        lambda: planned_time + timedelta(seconds=REDACTED,\n    )\n    await first_scheduler._emit_due_schedule_jobs()\n    await second_scheduler._emit_due_schedule_jobs()\n\n    jobs = await first_runtime.repository.list_jobs(\n        state=None,\n        job_type=None,\n        limit=REDACTED,\n        cursor_created_at=None,\n        cursor_id=None,\n    )\n    scheduled_jobs = [job for job in jobs if job.schedule_id == \"every-minute\"]\n    assert len(scheduled_jobs) == 1\n    async with first_runtime.session_factory() as session:\n        tick_count = await session.scalar(\n            select(func.count(ScheduleTick.id)).where(ScheduleTick.schedule_id == \"every-minute\")\n        )\n    assert tick_count == 1\n"

  await asyncio.gather(worker_task, scheduler_task, return_exceptions=REDACTED    events = await runtime.repository.list_events(job_id=REDACTED, after_id=REDACTED, limit=REDACTED    running_event = []\n\n    async def _make(\n        *,\n        name: str = \"test\",\n        db_path: Path | None = None,\n        schedule_content: str = \"schedules: []\\n\",\n        settings_overrides: dict[str, Any] | None = None,\n    ) -> Runtime:\n        resolved_db_path = db_path or (tmp_path / f\"{name}.db\")\n        schedule_path = tmp_path / f\"{name}_schedules.yaml\"\n broker=REDACTED,\n            tasks=REDACTED,\n        )\n        await runtime.initialize()\n        runtimes.append(runtime)\n        return runtime\n\n    yield _make\n\n    for runtime in reversed(runtimes):\n        await runtime.close()\n\n\ndef make_job_service(runtime: Runtime) -> JobService:\n    return JobService(\n        repository=REDACTED,\n        broker=REDACTED,\n        tasks=REDACTED,\n        logger=REDACTED\"test.jobs\", service=REDACTED\"test\"),\n    )\n\n\nasync def wait_for_job_state(\n    repository: JobRepository,\n    job_id: str,\n    terminal_states: set[str],\n    *,\n    timeout: float = 3.0,\n) -> Job:\n    deadline = asyncio.get_running_loop().time() + timeout\n    while True:\n        job = await repository.get_job(job_id)\n        if job is not None and job.state in terminal_states:\n            return job\n        if asyncio.get_running_loop().time() >= deadline:\n            msg = f\"timed out waiting for job {job_id} to reach {terminal_states}\"\n            raise AssertionError(msg)\n        await asyncio.sleep(0.02)\n\n\ndef utc_timestamp(\n    year: int,\n    month: int,\n    day: int,\n    hour: int,\n    minute:           "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom miniq.db.state_machine import is_transition_allowed, require_transition\nfrom miniq.enums import JobState\nfrom tests.conftest import RuntimeFactory, soon\n\n\ndef test_allowed_state_transitions() -> None:\n    assert is_transition_allowed(JobState.QUEUED, JobState.RUNNING)\n    assert is_transition_allowed(JobState.QUEUED, JobState.CANCELED)\n    assert is_transition_allowed(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.SUCCEEDED)\n    assert is_transition_allowed(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.FAILED)\n    assert is_transition_allowed(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.CANCELED)\n    assert is_transition_allowed(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.DEAD)\n    assert is_transition_allowed(JobState.FAILED, JobState.QUEUED)\n    assert is_transition_allowed(JobState.DEAD, JobState.QUEUED)\n\n\ndef test_invalid_state_transition_raises() -> None:\n    try:\n        require_transition(JobState.QUEUED, JobState.SUCCEEDED)\n    except ValueError as exc:\n        assert \"invalid job state transition\" in str(exc)\n    else:\n        raise AssertionError(\"expected an invalid transition to raise\")\n\n\nasync def test_cancel_request_keeps_running_job_running(runtime_factory: RuntimeFactory) -> None:\n    runtime = await runtime_factory(name=REDACTED\"cancel-running\")\n    job = await runtime.repository.create_job(\n        job_id=REDACTED\"job-cancel-running\",\n        job_type=REDACTED\"pipeline_demo\",\n        queue=REDACTED\"default\",\n        payload=REDACTED\"steps\": 3, \"step_delay_seconds\": 0.01},\n        max_attempts=REDACTED,\n        next_run_at=REDACTED,\n        idempotency_key=None,\n    )\n    claimed = await runtime.repository.claim_for_execution(\n        job_id=REDACTED,\n        stream_id=REDACTED\"1-0\",\n        consumer=REDACTED\"test-consumer\",\n    )\n    assert claimed is not None\n    updated = await runtime.repository.cancel_job(job_id=REDACTED    assert updated is not None\n    assert updated.state == JobState.RUNNING.value\n    assert updated.cancel_requested is True\n    events = await runtime.repository.list_events(job_id=REDACTED, after_id=REDACTED, limit=REDACTED    assert events[-1].message == \"cancel requested\"\n"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom miniq.observability.logging import get_logger\nfrom miniq.worker.service import WorkerService\nfrom tests.conftest import RuntimeFactory, make_job_service, soon\n\n\nasync def test_submit_reuses_existing_active_job_for_idempotency_key(\n    runtime_factory: RuntimeFactory,\n) -> None:\n    runtime = await runtime_factory(name=REDACTED\"idempotency-active\")\n    service = make_job_service(runtime)\n    first = await service.submit_job(\n        job_type=REDACTED\"sleep\",\n        payload=REDACTED\"seconds\": 0.01},\n        queue=REDACTED\"default\",\n        max_attempts=REDACTED,\n        run_at=REDACTED,\n        idempotency_key=REDACTED\"same-key\",\n    )\n    second = await service.submit_job(\n        job_type=REDACTED\"sleep\",\n        payload=REDACTED\"seconds\": 0.01},\n        queue=REDACTED\"default\",\n        max_attempts=REDACTED,\n        run_at=REDACTED,\n        idempotency_key=REDACTED\"same-key\",\n    )\n    jobs = await runtime.repository.list_jobs(\n        state=None,\n        job_type=None,\n        limit=REDACTED,\n        cursor_created_at=None,\n        cursor_id=None,\n    )\n    assert first.id == second.id\n    assert len(jobs) == 1\n\n\nasync def test_redelivered_succeeded_job_is_not_reexecuted(runtime_factory: RuntimeFactory) -> None:\n    runtime = await runtime_factory(name=REDACTED\"idempotency-redelivery\")\n    service = make_job_service(runtime)\n    await runtime.broker.ensure_group(\"default\")\n    worker = WorkerService(runtime=REDACTED, logger=REDACTED\"test.worker\", service=REDACTED\"test\"))\n    job = await service.submit_job(\n        job_type=REDACTED\"sleep\",\n        payload=REDACTED\"seconds\": 0.0},\n        queue=REDACTED\"default\",\n        max_attempts=REDACTED,\n        run_at=REDACTED,\n        idempotency_key=REDACTED\"job-done\",\n    )\n    first_message = (\n        await runtime.broker.read_group(\n            queues=REDACTED\"default\"],\n            consumer_name=REDACTED\"unit-consumer\",\n            count=REDACTED,\n            block_ms=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )[0]\n    await worker._handle_message(message=REDACTED, source=REDACTED\"unit\")\n    completed = await runtime.repository.get_job(job.id)\n    assert completed is not None\n    assert completed.state == \"SUCCEEDED\"\n\n    executed_again = False\n    original_run = runtime.tasks.run\n\n    async def fail_if_reexecuted(*args: object, **kwargs: object) -> dict[str, object]:\n        nonlocal executed_again\n        executed_again = True\n        raise AssertionError(\"duplicate delivery should not execute the task again\")\n\n    runtime.tasks.run = fail_if_reexecuted  # type: ignore[assignment]\n    try:\n        await runtime.broker.enqueue(queue=REDACTED\"default\", job_id=REDACTED, job_type=REDACTED        redelivered = (\n            await runtime.broker.read_group(\n                queues=REDACTED\"default\"],\n                consumer_name=REDACTED\"unit-consumer\",\n                count=REDACTED,\n                block_ms=REDACTED,\n            )\n        )[0]\n        await worker._handle_message(message=REDACTED, source=REDACTED\"unit\")\n    finally:\n        runtime.tasks.run = original_run  # type: ignore[assignment]\n    assert executed_again is False\n"
